title: Only The Essentials
description: A PvP QoL mod to simplify visuals
body:
# Only The Essentials

`Only The Essentials` is a lightweight client-side PvP utility mod focused on readability and consistency in crowded fights.

It simplifies other players by hiding their body model and armor (while keeping elytra visible), and replaces visual clutter with clean, configurable overlays that are easier to track in motion.

## Features

- Simplify other players for cleaner fights
  - Hide player model + armor layers
  - Keep elytra visible
- Configurable hitbox rendering
  - Wireframe or filled box
  - Adjustable thickness
  - ARGB color customization
  - Separate normal / targeted colors
- Optional 3D aim-direction line
  - Adjustable length and thickness
  - Separate normal / targeted colors
- Advanced filtering
  - Distance-based simplification (`-1` = always)
  - Player list modes: `BLACKLIST` / `WHITELIST`
- Preset/profile system
  - User presets (create, rename, delete)
  - Mandatory default profile (`DEFAULT`)
  - Preset-first workflow for consistent saving
- Auto-apply presets by server
  - Bind server lists to specific presets
  - Automatically apply the matching preset on join
- Config import / export (JSON)
- In-game configuration screen (Mod Menu + Cloth Config)
- Fully client-side

## Why use it?

In fast-paced PvP, visual noise makes tracking and targeting harder than it should be.
Only The Essentials keeps what matters: position, hitbox clarity, and readable aim direction.

## Requirements

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu (for config screen)
- Cloth Config API (dependency for config UI)

_For questions or issues, DM me on Discord: **bloupyi**_
